name: §6Spirit
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Intelligence: §b100
§7Speed: §f30

§6Spirit Assistance
§7Spawns and assists you when you
§7are a ghost in Dungeons.

§6Spirit Cooldowns
§7Reduces the cooldown of your ghost
§7abilities in dungeons by §a50%§7.

§6Half Life
§7If you are the first player to die in
§7a dungeon, the score penalty for
§7that death is reduced to §a1§7.

§8This pet's perks are active even
§8when the pet is not summoned!

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

§8Can be upgraded at Kat in The Hub!

variants.name: Candy Slime Spirit Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aSpirit§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
